top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' AND i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' AND i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium'
AND maj.major_name = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' AND i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium'
AND maj.major_name = 'Student_Club';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' AND i.source = 'Student_Club' THEN i.amount ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' THEN i.amount ELSE 0 END) AS percentage
FROM income i
JOIN member m ON i.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.t_shirt_size = 'medium' AND i.amount = 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM member m
JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'medium';
